en: Woe to her who is rebellious and defiled, the oppressing city!
zh: 這叛逆、污穢、欺壓人的城有禍了！

en: She listens to no voice; she accepts no correction. She does not trust in the LORD; she does not draw near to her God.
zh: 她不聽話， 也不受管教； 她不倚靠耶和華， 也不親近她的 神。

en: Her officials within her are roaring lions; her judges are evening wolves that leave nothing till the morning.
zh: 城中的領袖都是咆哮的獅子， 城中的審判官是夜間的豺狼， 甚麼都不留到早晨。

en: Her prophets are fickle, treacherous men; her priests profane what is holy; they do violence to the law.
zh: 城中的先知都是輕浮詭詐的人； 城中的祭司褻瀆聖物， 違犯律法。

en: The LORD within her is righteous; he does no injustice; every morning he shows forth his justice; each dawn he does not fail; but the unjust knows no shame.
zh: 耶和華在城中是公義的， 決不行不義的事； 他每日早晨都顯明公正， 永不止息。 不公義的人卻不知廉恥。

en: "I have cut off nations; their battlements are in ruins; I have laid waste their streets so that no one walks in them; their cities have been made desolate, without a man, without an inhabitant.
zh: 我耶和華已經剪除列國， 他們的城樓被毀； 我已經使他們的街道荒涼， 以致杳無人跡； 他們的城市荒廢，以致無人存留，無人居住。

en: I said, 'Surely you will fear me; you will accept correction. Then your dwelling would not be cut off according to all that I have appointed against you.' But all the more they were eager to make all their deeds corrupt.
zh: 我說：“她定要敬畏我， 接受管教。” 這樣，她的住所 必不會照著我原定對她的懲罰被剪除。 可是他們殷勤行惡， 敗壞了自己一切所作的。

en: "Therefore wait for me," declares the LORD, "for the day when I rise up to seize the prey. For my decision is to gather nations, to assemble kingdoms, to pour out upon them my indignation, all my burning anger; for in the fire of my jealousy all the earth shall be consumed.
zh: 耶和華說：“因此，你們要等候我， 等候我起來指證 的日子， 我已經決定集合萬邦， 召聚列國， 把我的盛怒， 就是我的一切烈怒，都傾倒在他們身上； 因為全地都必被我的妒火吞滅。

en: "For at that time I will change the speech of the peoples to a pure speech, that all of them may call upon the name of the LORD and serve him with one accord.
zh: 那時我要使萬民有潔淨的嘴唇， 他們全都可以呼求耶和華的名， 同心合意事奉耶和華。

en: From beyond the rivers of Cush my worshipers, the daughter of my dispersed ones, shall bring my offering.
zh: 敬拜我的人，就是我所分散的人， 必從古實河外而來， 給我獻上禮物。

en: "On that day you shall not be put to shame because of the deeds by which you have rebelled against me; for then I will remove from your midst your proudly exultant ones, and you shall no longer be haughty in my holy mountain.
zh: 到了那日， 你必不因你背叛我所作的一切感到羞愧， 因為那時我必從你中間 除掉那些自高自大的人。 在我的聖山上， 你必不再高傲。

en: But I will leave in your midst a people humble and lowly. They shall seek refuge in the name of the LORD,
zh: 但我要在你中間 留下謙虛卑微的人； 他們必投靠耶和華的名。

en: those who are left in Israel; they shall do no injustice and speak no lies, nor shall there be found in their mouth a deceitful tongue. For they shall graze and lie down, and none shall make them afraid."
zh: 以色列的餘民必不再行不義， 也必不說謊； 他們的口裡也沒有詭詐的舌頭。 他們吃喝躺臥， 沒有人驚嚇他們。”

en: Sing aloud, O daughter of Zion; shout, O Israel! Rejoice and exult with all your heart, O daughter of Jerusalem!
zh: 錫安的居民 哪！你們要高歌。 以色列啊！你們要歡呼。 耶路撒冷的居民哪！你們要滿心歡喜快樂。

en: The LORD has taken away the judgments against you; he has cleared away your enemies. The King of Israel, the LORD, is in your midst; you shall never again fear evil.
zh: 耶和華已經除去你們的刑罰， 趕走你們的仇敵。 以色列的王，耶和華在你們中間， 你們必不再懼怕災禍。

en: On that day it shall be said to Jerusalem: "Fear not, O Zion; let not your hands grow weak.
zh: 到了那日， 必有人對耶路撒冷說： “錫安哪！不要懼怕； 你的手不要下垂。

en: The LORD your God is in your midst, a mighty one who will save; he will rejoice over you with gladness; he will quiet you by his love; he will exult over you with loud singing.
zh: 耶和華你的 神在你中間， 他是施行拯救的大能者， 必因你歡欣快樂， 必默然愛你， 而且必因你喜樂歡唱。”

en: I will gather those of you who mourn for the festival, so that you will no longer suffer reproach.
zh: “那些屬你，為了切慕大會而憂愁的人， 他們擔當了羞辱； 我必招聚他們。

en: Behold, at that time I will deal with all your oppressors. And I will save the lame and gather the outcast, and I will change their shame into praise and renown in all the earth.
zh: 看哪！那時我必對付一切苦待你的人； 我必拯救那些瘸腿的， 聚集那些被趕散的； 在全地受羞辱的， 我必使他們得稱讚，有名聲。

en: At that time I will bring you in, at the time when I gather you together; for I will make you renowned and praised among all the peoples of the earth, when I restore your fortunes before your eyes," says the LORD.
zh: 那時我必把你們領回， 那時我必把你們齊集； 我使你們被擄的人歸回的時候， 必在你們眼前， 叫你們在地上的萬民中得稱讚， 有名聲。” 這是耶和華說的。
